long_description:
NRE were alerted of link flaps between cbs01.eq01.mad01 et-0/0/18 <-> cbs02.dr01.mad03 et-2/0/17. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19662
short_description: cbs01.eq01.mad01 et-0/0/18 <-> cbs02.dr01.mad03 et-2/0/17 | Link Flap
close_notes: Link came up by itself. No impact as it is just one link in the bundle and bundle did not go down.  Monitoring
